title: Kuromatea glabra
taxonomy: Kuromatea glabra is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to New Caledonia, a Pacific island country. Within the family Phyllanthaceae, Kuromatea glabra belongs to the order Malpighiales and is classified as a member of the genus Kuromatea. The classification of Kuromatea glabra is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its smooth leaves, which distinguish it from other plants in the same family. This classification is based on the latest research and scientific discoveries in the field of botany.
